Arisudan

Founder, Publisher & Editor-in-Chief

Arisudan is the founder and editor-in-chief of AriSphere. An experienced journalist, digital media architect, and former systems developer, Ari has spent over 15 years tracking cognitive AI evolution, the geopolitics of hardware chips, and digital attention philosophy. He holds a degree in Computer Science and Media Studies and directs the editorial vision at AriSphere.

Professional Background: Founder of AriSphere. Over 15 years tracking cognitive AI, hardware architectures, and digital attention metrics. Previously developed embedded control systems and managed media platforms.

Expertise
Cognitive AIHardware GeopoliticsDigital Attention PhilosophyFull-Stack Engineering
Skills
Systems ArchitectureTechnical JournalismDatabase DesignAI Research
Editorial Board Member 8 publications 👁 60406 total views

Technology

The Silicon Mind: Navigating the Intersection of Cognitive AI and Creative Writing

As artificial intelligence systems enter creative sectors, authors and technologists debate where engineering stops and creative soul begins.
